title: Finish The Intro And Leave Pallet
summary: Clear the opening sequence, get a starter from Oak, and be ready to head north from Pallet Town.
completion_predicate: The player has left the initial Oak intro flow and can travel toward Viridian City.
failure_hints: If dialog is active, keep the action batch short and clear text before moving.
Use the annotated frame to confirm whether Oak, the lab, or the house doorway is in view.
save_recommendation: Save after the intro is complete and the player can freely move in Pallet Town.
route_hint: Use raw actions for the intro, then move north out of Pallet Town toward Route 1.

title: Reach Viridian Mart And Get Oak's Parcel
summary: Travel from Pallet Town to Viridian City and trigger the mart sequence that gives Oak's Parcel.
completion_predicate: The flags report that Oak's Parcel is in the inventory.
failure_hints: If the route is unexplored, probe with short movement batches and refresh observation after each batch.
Use navigation endpoints once Route 1 coordinates are known.
save_recommendation: Save once Oak's Parcel has been obtained in Viridian City.
route_hint: Head north through Route 1 into Viridian City, then enter the mart.

title: Return Oak's Parcel
summary: Bring the parcel back to Oak's Lab and clear the follow-up dialog until the Pokedex is received.
completion_predicate: The flags report that the player has the Pokedex.
failure_hints: When back in Oak's Lab, prefer short dialog-clearing action batches instead of long movement chains.
If Pi is unsure which NPC is targeted, use the interaction probe and the raw frame together.
save_recommendation: Save after the Pokedex is awarded and the lab dialog is fully cleared.
route_hint: Go south to Pallet Town, enter Oak's Lab, and finish the dialog chain.

title: Reach Viridian Forest
summary: Travel north from Viridian City toward Route 2 and the south forest gate.
completion_predicate: The current map is Route 2, Viridian Forest Gate (S), Viridian Forest, or the north gate after the player already has the Pokedex.
failure_hints: Heal or shop first if the party is weak, but keep the objective anchored on the forest route.
If Pi loses the route, consult the explored map and only then try raw exploration.
save_recommendation: Save at the south forest gate before crossing the forest.
route_hint: Head north in Viridian City to Route 2 and enter Viridian Forest.

title: Cross Viridian Forest
summary: Navigate through Viridian Forest and exit into Pewter City.
completion_predicate: The current map becomes Pewter City.
failure_hints: If the path is not fully explored, use navigation for known tiles and raw movement only to reveal new corridors.
The dashboard should show whether the agent is in a no-movement loop; recover before wasting more turns.
save_recommendation: Save after arriving in Pewter City and before entering the gym.
route_hint: Keep moving northward through the explored forest map until the north gate and Pewter exit are reached.

title: Prepare In Pewter And Enter The Gym
summary: Arrive in Pewter City, restore the team if needed, and move into Pewter Gym.
completion_predicate: The current map is Pewter Gym or a Brock battle has started.
failure_hints: Use the dashboard intent panel to verify whether the turn plan is trying to heal, shop, or go straight to the gym.
If the team is low, prioritize the Pokecenter before challenging Brock.
save_recommendation: Create a fresh save before stepping into the Brock fight sequence.
route_hint: Use local navigation inside Pewter City to reach the Pokecenter, mart, then the gym entrance.

title: Defeat Brock
summary: Clear the Pewter Gym challenge and defeat Brock to earn the Boulder Badge.
completion_predicate: The badge count increases to at least 1.
failure_hints: Keep battle action batches extremely short and re-observe after each menu advance.
If the fight goes badly, use the top-ranked recovery save rather than improvising from a weak state.
save_recommendation: Auto-save on battle entry and again after the badge is earned.
route_hint: Finish the gym trainer/battle flow, then confirm the badge dialog is fully cleared.

title: Phase 1 Complete
summary: The Boulder Badge is earned. The Red phase-1 objective pack through Brock is complete.
completion_predicate: The player has at least one badge.
failure_hints: Transition to the next objective pack before spending many turns wandering in Pewter.
save_recommendation: Keep a clean post-Brock save as a durable regression checkpoint.
route_hint: Stabilize the run state, save, and prepare the next progression pack.
